title: [BUG] displyName typo
author: forti-as
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

[Lib version: 4.4.0 exceljs/lib/doc/table.js](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/5bed18b45e824f409b08456b59b87430ded023ab/lib/doc/table.js#L408) contains a typo as this.table.displyName should be this.table.displayName
